properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret key used to generate and validate access tokens. Must be at least 32 characters long in production.

properties.name: jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds. Default is 1 hour (3600000 ms).

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time in milliseconds. Default is 7 days (604800000 ms).

properties.name: aws.s3.bucket-name
properties.description: AWS S3 bucket name for storing uploaded music files.

properties.name: aws.s3.region
properties.description: AWS region where the S3 bucket is located.

properties.name: aws.s3.access-key
properties.description: AWS access key for authenticating with S3. Should be set in environment variables or application properties, not hardcoded.

properties.name: aws.s3.secret-key
properties.description: AWS secret key for authenticating with S3. Should be set in environment variables or application properties, not hardcoded.

values.description: Default secret - MUST change in production
Default S3 bucket name for music uploads
Default AWS region for S3 bucket
AWS access key for S3 - must be set in environment variables or application properties
AWS secret key for S3 - must be set in environment variables or application properties
